display.purpose: Hero headlines only; Poppins 600, balanced wrap, one purple accent word.

label.purpose: Eyebrows and technical labels; Geist Mono 500.

shadows.name: button-primary
shadows.purpose: Faint purple-tinted seat under primary buttons.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Tinted lift on card hover, never at rest.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Reserved single hero/product accent glow; not decoration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA (Book a demo). Purple pill, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #854dff; color: #fff; font: 600 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(124,77,255,0.30); transition: background 0.2s ease-out, transform 0.2s ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7c4dff; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f7f7fa, 0 0 0 4px #9969ff; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis action; white pill with hairline border that warms to purple on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #fff; color: #141414; font: 600 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #ececee; border-radius: 9999px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #c4aaff; color: #7c4dff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f7f7fa, 0 0 0 4px #9969ff; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content card: white on cool paper, flat at rest, tinted lift on hover.
components.html:
One profile, owned

Resolve every fan signal into one consented, in-region profile you hold.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #141414; border: 1px solid #ececee; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, border-color 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: #dccfff; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(153,105,255,0.10); } .ds-card h3 { font: 600 1.125rem/1.2 Poppins, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card p { font: 400 0.9375rem/1.6 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #3a3a3a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status token — the one place purple fills a shape. Used for 'Live' / 'Preview' labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #f5f0ff; color: #7c4dff; font: 600 0.75rem/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; }

components.name: Pill
components.description: Neutral metadata pill; hairline border, muted text.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: #fff; color: #70707a; font: 500 0.75rem/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #ececee; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: Fanfinity is a serious, in-region fan data platform, and the site reads like an institution you'd trust with your fan graph — not an AI startup landing page. Light-editorial: near-white backgrounds, generous whitespace, real audience photography paired with honest product UI, and one disciplined purple accent used rarely enough to mean something. Dark is a guest — a single near-black CTA band and footer, never the default hero. Depth comes from purple-tinted shadows and subtle borders, not glass or glow.
keyCharacteristics: Light-first surfaces; dark reserved for exactly one CTA band + footer.
Purple as a single locked accent (<=10% of any screen), never a wash.
Real photography (audience / crowd / people-on-phones), not sport-specific, paired with honest product UI.
Phosphor icons, one stroke weight, currentColor.
Asymmetric / zig-zag rhythm and a signature bento over repeated 3-up grids.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Purple is used on <=10% of any given screen — buttons, links, one headline word, small tokens. If the viewport reads purple, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Light-First Rule
rules.body: The default surface is Cool Paper. Dark (#0b0712) appears at most twice per page: one CTA band and the footer. A dark hero is forbidden.

rules.name: The Ink-End Rule
rules.body: Body text sits toward Ink, never light gray for elegance. Muted Ink is for labels and captions only.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Headers are sentence case. Title Case reads like a 2014 SaaS template.

rules.name: The Tabular Figures Rule
rules.body: Stats and figures use tabular-nums so numbers don't jitter across rows.

rules.name: The Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are purple-tinted, never neutral black.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; elevation is a response to state, not a default coat.

dos: Do lead light — Cool Paper hero, one highlighted purple headline word, real audience/product photography.
Do keep purple to <=10% of a screen: buttons, links, one word, small tokens.
Do reserve #0b0712 for exactly one CTA band + the footer.
Do use Phosphor icons at one stroke weight with currentColor.
Do use tinted (brand-*) shadows and the feature-split / bento rhythm.
Do keep body text toward Ink, measure at 65-75ch, headers sentence case, figures tabular-nums.
Do label the Engage/widget layer as Preview; show the live data layer as real UI.
donts: Don't ship a dark purple mesh-gradient hero — the most common AI design fingerprint.
Don't use purple as a full-bleed wash; it's an accent, not a surface.
Don't use default icon sets (e.g. the old Tabler set) — a default AI look.
Don't repeat symmetric three-equal-card grids — the most generic AI layout.
Don't use light-gray body text for elegance, black (untinted) drop-shadows, neon, or glassmorphism.
Don't publish invented metrics, or let sports-specific imagery/examples leak onto the horizontal home and /platform pages.
Don't name the underlying stack (Jitsu / Airbyte / ClickHouse / PubNub) anywhere in the UI.
